summary: Approved bounded provider retry hardening after Hermes diff review. The change is confined to OpenAI-compatible provider request handling and tests, keeps Authorization headers out of logs, rebuilds JSON request bodies for every retry, and only retries transient transport/status failures.
accepted_changes: Added shared retry option/backoff/request helpers in internal/provider/retry.go.
LLM and TTS constructors now parse max_retries and retry_backoff_ms from provider options with safe defaults.
LLM chat completion and TTS speech POST calls now retry transport errors plus HTTP 429/5xx and stop on context cancellation during backoff.
HTTP 4xx errors other than 429 still return parsed provider error messages without retrying.
Added focused provider tests for retry option parsing, transient retry success, non-retryable 4xx behavior, and context-stopped backoff.

security_review.notes: No secrets were added. Authorization header construction is unchanged and not logged. Origin remote remains the expected HTTPS GitHub URL.

quality_review.notes: Static review found no obvious API contract break. Go formatting/tests are blocked because go is missing in this Hermes environment.
